form.formComment: Surprised two starts back at this track to win by 0.8 lengths in 17.03, beating Jackpot Jack. Last start finished 5th in a Grade 5 on April 9 over 300m at this track behind She Lies Easy beaten 7 lengths (17.45). Look for improvement. Not out of it.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Surprised two starts back at this track to win by 0.8 lengths in 17.03, beating Jackpot Jack. Last start finished 5th in a Grade 5 on April 9 over 300m at this track behind She Lies Easy beaten 7 lengths (17.45). Look for improvement. Not out of it.

form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (26.25) when fifth over 450m at Grafton in a Grade 5. Still a maiden from the draw but has placed two times. Looks well placed and should feature.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Missed the frame latest (26.25) when fifth over 450m at Grafton in a Grade 5. Still a maiden from the draw but has placed two times. Looks well placed and should feature.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (20.56) at Grafton in a Grade 5, finishing seventh and beaten 10 lengths. Has one success and two minors from four starts from box 3. Has ability and looks a key chance.

formComments.title: TAB

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Collided on the first turn, losing valuable ground.

form.formComment: Modest effort last time out when fourth over 300m at this track. Prefer in something easier.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (17.56) at this track in a Grade 5, finishing seventh and beaten 11 lengths. Has two placings from three starts from the draw. With even luck and a clean start should be thereabouts.

form.formComment: Hit the frame latest (25.82) when third at Grafton in a Grade 5. Has two minors from four starts from box 6. Will need some luck to feature.

form.formComment: Was a Mix winner (27.70) two back then found trouble and failed to finish at this track before a three months spell. Suited here and worth another try fresh.
